localFilePath.title: Local File Path
localFilePath.description: Local filesystem path to a single Access database file or a directory containing Access files.

localFilePath.title: Local File Path
localFilePath.description: Absolute path to the .accdb or .mdb file, or a directory. Supports ~ expansion (e.g. ~/data/sales.accdb). All .accdb and .mdb files found recursively in a directory will be ingested.

connection.title: Access Database Location (Local Path or S3)
connection.description: Choose between local file system path (object) or S3 bucket location (object) for Access database files.

tableFilterPattern.title: Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude tables that matches the pattern.
